title: usecase.Init (bootstrap .tasks/ + workspace.json + local.json + .gitignore)
acceptance_criteria: Creates .tasks/{items,events,operations,locks,hooks} and writes .tasks/.gitignore excluding index.json, operations/, locks/, AND local.json (§3, §6, SQ-003).
Writes workspace.json (committed) with workspace_name, default_project (if --project given), claim_ttl_minutes=60, heartbeat_interval_minutes=30, empty critical_path, git defaults.
Writes local.json (gitignored) with default_agent (from --agent flag, $TASK_AGENT_ID env, or $USER), agent_role=human, empty agent_capabilities.
Idempotent: re-running with the same args is a no-op (preserves existing local.json so the per-VM identity isn't clobbered).
Returns ErrUsage when run inside an existing workspace unless --force is set.
